com.jsyn.ports

Class PortBlockPart

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.ports.PortBlockPart
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ConnectableInput, ConnectableOutput
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    InputMixingBlockPart

    public class PortBlockPart
extends java.lang.Object
implements ConnectableOutput, ConnectableInput
    Part of a multi-part port, for example, the left side of a stereo port.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2009 Mobileer Inc
